title: Moar Diamonds
description: The Moar Diamonds datapack adds a bunch of new diamond types to the game. These are entirely just meant as crafting components that are used by my other datapacks.
body:
Moar Diamonds

The Moar Diamonds datapack adds a bunch of new diamond types to the game. These are entirely just meant as crafting components that are used by my other datapacks.

You can craft them in the Diamond Crafter. All recipes can all be found HERE, or in-game (press L)

The datapack REQUIRES this Library, as well as this Resource Pack.

Learn more from this video:
